product: Changes to OpenSharing (formerly Delta Sharing) open recipient tokens
tagline: Based on customer feedback and the introduction of OpenSharing, this change has been postponed from July 1, 2026.
what_it_does: Based on customer feedback and the introduction of OpenSharing, this change has been postponed from July 1, 2026. The new transition date will be updated when available. No immediate action is required.
why_it_matters: This change improves network security and lets recipients configure recipient specific network policies and firewall rules.
plain_summary: Based on customer feedback and the introduction of OpenSharing, this change has been postponed from July 1, 2026. The new transition date will be updated when available.
key_takeaway: Based on customer feedback and the introduction of OpenSharing, this change has been postponed from July 1, 2026.
